items.caption: A vivid illustration of soil pollution, set against a yellow background. at the top, the title "soil pollution" is prominently displayed. below the title, a list of causes is outlined, including industrial waste, bad soil management, fuel leakage, and soil erosion. the effects of these causes are also listed, which include a decrease in soil fertility, soil erosion, and toxic dust. the illustration is detailed, with various objects such as tires, bottles, and a bucket scattered across the soil, symbolizing the pollution. the overall message is a call to action to address these environmental issues.
